name: 劉傳銘
objective:
In this class, we introduce the role, principles, and wide-range applications of spatial databases. The relationship to traditional databases will be discussed first, and then the general architecture of spatial databases will be introduced. After understanding the concepts of spatial data and the relevant models, we discuss effective ways to manage and process spatial data. The topics include:(1) Introduction and applications of spatial databases, (2) Spatial concepts and data models, (3) Spatial search languages, (4) Spatial data storage and indexing, (5) Spatial search processing and optimization, and (6) Spatial networks. In addition, with the advances in computing techniques and environments, we also explore the recent trends of spatial databases, such as distributed databases, big spatial data, vector databases, and how AI models help.
在本課程中，我們將介紹空間資料庫的角色、原則和廣泛的應用。我們將先討論空間資料庫與傳統資料庫的關係，然後再介紹空間資料庫的整體架構。在理解空間資料的概念和相關模型後，我們將討論管理和處理空間資料的有效方法。主題包括：(1) 空間資料庫的介紹和應用；(2) 空間概念和資料模型；(3) 空間搜尋語言；(4) 空間資料儲存和索引；(5) 空間搜尋處理和最佳化；以及 (6) 空間網路。此外，隨著運算技術和環境的進步，我們也將探討空間資料庫的最新趨勢，例如分散式資料庫、空間大數據、向量資料庫以及人工智慧模型如何助力空間資料庫的發展。
schedule:
Introduction to Spatial Databases (3hrs)
Spatial Concepts and Data Models (3hrs)
paper review (4hrs)
Spatial Query Languages (3hrs)
Spatial Storage and Indexing (6hrs)
papre review (4hrs)
project proposal discussion (3hrs)
Spatial Query Processing and Optimization (3hrs)
Spatial Networks (3hrs)
Moving Objects Databases (3hrs)
Big Spatial Databases (3hrs)
Recent Trends in Spatial Databases (12hrs)
project demo (4hrs)
scorePolicy:
* Class Participation: 10%
* Presentation: 30%
* Project: 60%
  - Proposal 20%
  - Final Demo 15%
  - Report 25%
materials:
Referred Books
*Shashi Shekhar and Sanjay Chawla, Spatial Databases: A Tour, Prentice Hall, 2003. ISBN: 0-13-017480-7
*Ralf Hartmut Gutting and Markus Schneider, Moving Objects Databases, Morgan Kaufmann, 2005. ISBN-10: 0-12-088799-6
